basic_details.job_title: IIT Delhi Project Consultant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IIT Delhi)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IIT Delhi) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 4 Project Consultant (Medical Officer / Specialist Consultant) Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply online through the official website.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS with valid DMC registration, MD with valid DMC registration
qualification.details: Project Consultant (Medical Officer (MBBS)): MBBS with valid DMC registration. Experience: 2 Years' experience [after internship] with at least one year in a reputed government hospital in medicine/emergency medicine/surgery. Project Consultant (Specialist Consultant MD-Gynaecologist): MD (in the specific area of specialization after the MBBS degree) with valid DMC registration. Experience: Two (02) year relevant experience. Medical officer have to attend other patients also as general physician.

salary_details.details: Project Consultant (Medical Officer (MBBS)): Rs.1,06,650/- p.m. (consolidated including HRA) Project Consultant (Specialist Consultant MD-Gynaecologist): Rs.1,52,438/- p.m. (consolidated including HRA)

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Delhi Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 24-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Delhi to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Delhi Project Consultant posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the IIT Delhi Project Consultant recruitment is 24th May 2026. Ensure you submit your application well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Project Consultant position?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies for the Project Consultant (Medical Officer / Specialist Consultant) posts released by IIT Delhi.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Consultant (MBBS) post?
faq.answer: For the Project Consultant (MBBS) post, candidates must possess an MBBS degree with a valid DMC registration and at least 2 years of experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Specialist Consultant (MD-Gynaecologist) position?
faq.answer: The selected Specialist Consultant (MD-Gynaecologist) will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 1,52,438/- per month, including HRA.

faq.question: Q5. Is there an application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, according to the official notification, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the IIT Delhi Project Consultant recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve shortlisting of eligible candidates followed by an online interview.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for these Project Consultant positions?
faq.answer: The Project Consultant positions at IIT Delhi are on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF link is provided in the 'Important Links' section of this article. You can download it from there for detailed information.

faq.question: Q9. What is the official website for IIT Delhi recruitment?
faq.answer: The official website for IIT Delhi recruitment, specifically for this notification, is http://ird.iitd.ac.in/rec.

faq.question: Q10. Are there any age relaxations mentioned for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The official notification does not explicitly mention age limits or relaxations. Candidates are advised to check the detailed notification for any such provisions.
